definition: Route-level score built from low visibility hours, low ceiling hours, precipitation hours, high wind hours, maximum wind speed, minimum visibility, and minimum ceiling.
Origin-airport daily departure volume percentile within the same airport's observed distribution.
Primary measure is arrival-delay 15+ rate; cancellation rate and mean arrival delay are secondary measures.
Positive delayed-arrival burden above the normal-workload baseline within the same weather-intensity bin.
Weather-intensity and workload-percentile region where reliability loss increases sharply.
